name: obsidian-lexibridge
description: 连接 Obsidian 与词汇数据源，支持生词同步、词元识别、自动双链。

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test: node scripts/test-markdown-generator.mjs && node scripts/test-sync-utils.mjs && node scripts/test-batch-update-utils.mjs && node scripts/check-mobile-compat.mjs
